arabicText: وَٱلطُّورِ
translationText: By the Mount.

arabicText: وَكِتَٰبٍۢ مَّسْطُورٍۢ
translationText: And a Book inscribed.

arabicText: فِى رَقٍّۢ مَّنشُورٍۢ
translationText: In a published scroll.

arabicText: وَٱلْبَيْتِ ٱلْمَعْمُورِ
translationText: And the frequented House.

arabicText: وَٱلسَّقْفِ ٱلْمَرْفُوعِ
translationText: And the elevated roof.

arabicText: وَٱلْبَحْرِ ٱلْمَسْجُورِ
translationText: And the seething sea.

arabicText: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّكَ لَوَٰقِعٌۭ
translationText: The punishment of your Lord is coming.

arabicText: مَّا لَهُۥ مِن دَافِعٍۢ
translationText: There is nothing to avert it.

arabicText: يَوْمَ تَمُورُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ مَوْرًۭا
translationText: On the Day when the heaven sways in agitation.

arabicText: وَتَسِيرُ ٱلْجِبَالُ سَيْرًۭا
translationText: And the mountains go into motion.

arabicText: فَوَيْلٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
translationText: Woe on that Day to the deniers.

arabicText: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى خَوْضٍۢ يَلْعَبُونَ
translationText: Those who play with speculation.

arabicText: يَوْمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا
translationText: The Day when they are shoved into the Fire of Hell forcefully.

arabicText: هَٰذِهِ ٱلنَّارُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
translationText: "This is the Fire which you used to deny.

arabicText: أَفَسِحْرٌ هَٰذَآ أَمْ أَنتُمْ لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
translationText: Is this magic, or do you not see?

arabicText: ٱصْلَوْهَا فَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ ۖ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
translationText: Burn in it. Whether you are patient, or impatient, it is the same for you. You are only being repaid for what you used to do."

arabicText: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَنَعِيمٍۢ
translationText: But the righteous will be amid gardens and bliss.

arabicText: فَٰكِهِينَ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
translationText: Enjoying what their Lord has given them, and their Lord has spared them the suffering of Hell.

arabicText: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
translationText: Eat and drink happily, for what you used to do.

arabicText: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍۢ مَّصْفُوفَةٍۢ ۖ وَزَوَّجْنَٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍۢ
translationText: Relaxing on luxurious furnishings; and We will couple them with gorgeous spouses.

arabicText: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمَٰنٍ أَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ وَمَآ أَلَتْنَٰهُم مِّنْ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَىْءٍۢ ۚ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٌۭ
translationText: Those who believed and their offspring followed them in faith-We will unite them with their offspring, and We will not deprive them of any of their works. Every person is hostage to what he has earned.

arabicText: وَأَمْدَدْنَٰهُم بِفَٰكِهَةٍۢ وَلَحْمٍۢ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
translationText: And We will supply them with fruit, and meat; such as they desire.

arabicText: يَتَنَٰزَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأْسًۭا لَّا لَغْوٌۭ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأْثِيمٌۭ
translationText: They will exchange therein a cup; wherein is neither harm, nor sin.

arabicText: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ غِلْمَانٌۭ لَّهُمْ كَأَنَّهُمْ لُؤْلُؤٌۭ مَّكْنُونٌۭ
translationText: Serving them will be youths like hidden pearls.

arabicText: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍۢ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
translationText: And they will approach one another, inquiring.

arabicText: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبْلُ فِىٓ أَهْلِنَا مُشْفِقِينَ
translationText: They will say, "Before this, we were fearful for our families.

arabicText: فَمَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْنَا وَوَقَىٰنَا عَذَابَ ٱلسَّمُومِ
translationText: But God blessed us, and spared us the agony of the Fiery Winds.

arabicText: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
translationText: Before this, we used to pray to Him. He is the Good, the Compassionate."

arabicText: فَذَكِّرْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنٍۢ وَلَا مَجْنُونٍ
translationText: So remind. By the grace of your Lord, you are neither a soothsayer, nor a madman.

arabicText: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرٌۭ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِۦ رَيْبَ ٱلْمَنُونِ
translationText: Or do they say, "A poet-we await for him a calamity of time"?

arabicText: قُلْ تَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَإِنِّى مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْمُتَرَبِّصِينَ
translationText: Say, "Go on waiting; I will be waiting with you."

arabicText: أَمْ تَأْمُرُهُمْ أَحْلَٰمُهُم بِهَٰذَآ ۚ أَمْ هُمْ قَوْمٌۭ طَاغُونَ
translationText: Or is it that their dreams compel them to this? Or are they aggressive people?

arabicText: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُۥ ۚ بَل لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
translationText: Or do they say, "He made it up"? Rather, they do not believe.

arabicText: فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِحَدِيثٍۢ مِّثْلِهِۦٓ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَٰدِقِينَ
translationText: So let them produce a discourse like it, if they are truthful.

arabicText: أَمْ خُلِقُوا۟ مِنْ غَيْرِ شَىْءٍ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْخَٰلِقُونَ
translationText: Or were they created out of nothing? Or are they the creators?

arabicText: أَمْ خَلَقُوا۟ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ ۚ بَل لَّا يُوقِنُونَ
translationText: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? In fact, they are not certain.

arabicText: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُصَۣيْطِرُونَ
translationText: Or do they possess the treasuries of your Lord? Or are they the controllers?

arabicText: أَمْ لَهُمْ سُلَّمٌۭ يَسْتَمِعُونَ فِيهِ ۖ فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُم بِسُلْطَٰنٍۢ مُّبِينٍ
translationText: Or do they have a stairway by means of which they listen? Then let their listener produce a clear proof.

arabicText: أَمْ لَهُ ٱلْبَنَٰتُ وَلَكُمُ ٱلْبَنُونَ
translationText: Or for Him the daughters, and for you the sons?

arabicText: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًۭا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍۢ مُّثْقَلُونَ
translationText: Or do you demand a payment from them, and they are burdened by debt?

arabicText: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
translationText: Or do they know the future, and they are writing it down?

arabicText: أَمْ يُرِيدُونَ كَيْدًۭا ۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْمَكِيدُونَ
translationText: Or are they planning a conspiracy? The conspiracy will befall the disbelievers.

arabicText: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلَٰهٌ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ سُبْحَٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
translationText: Or do they have a god besides God? God transcends what they associate.

arabicText: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ كِسْفًۭا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًۭا يَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابٌۭ مَّرْكُومٌۭ
translationText: Even if they were to see lumps of the sky falling down, they would say, "A mass of clouds."

arabicText: فَذَرْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ يُلَٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يُصْعَقُونَ
translationText: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be stunned.

arabicText: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْـًۭٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
translationText: The Day when their ploys will avail them nothing; and they will not be helped.

arabicText: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ عَذَابًۭا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
translationText: For those who do wrong, there is a punishment besides that; but most of them do not know.

arabicText: وَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا ۖ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
translationText: So patiently await the decision of your Lord, for you are before Our Eyes; and proclaim the praises of your Lord when you arise.

arabicText: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَإِدْبَٰرَ ٱلنُّجُومِ
translationText: And glorify Him during the night, and at the receding of the stars.
